about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A passionate developer crafting impactful digital experiences
about.bio: I'm a final-year Information Technology student at the University of Transport Ho Chi Minh City with a solid foundation in Data Structures, Algorithms, and Object-Oriented Programming. I specialize in the React/Next.js and Node.js ecosystems, and I'm passionate about building clean, high-performance, maintainable software systems.

info.location: Tan Binh, Ho Chi Minh City

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A journey through the projects I've built — from most recent to earliest

items.title: Human Anomaly Localization
items.description: A real-time AI surveillance system utilizing Computer Vision to detect abnormal behaviors (falling), helping to ensure the safety of the elderly and children. Achieved 90% accuracy.
highlights: 4-path hybrid detection algorithm (Bounding Box ratio, angle, and velocity)
Border Integrity Check mechanism to eliminate camera edge noise
Real-time WebSocket video streaming with FastAPI
YOLOv8s-pose model serving with async RESTful APIs

items.title: Jewelry Sales System
items.description: A diamond appraisal and management system following GIA 4C standards, built on Microservices architecture for scalability and maintainability.
highlights: Next.js online appraisal lookup interface with statistical Dashboard
Independent Appraisal Service with Express.js Microservice
PostgreSQL schema design with data integrity guarantees
Full Docker containerization for consistent deployment

items.title: SEVINA
items.description: A self-driving car rental web platform integrating GPS positioning, real-time vehicle tracking, and nearest station search algorithm (10–20km radius) based on user location.
highlights: Interactive UI with ReactJS, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion animations
Goong Map API integration for GPS routing and station search
Redux for complex global state management
Deployed on Vercel with CI/CD pipelines
